Reviews Contact

Client Reviews

5.0/5 average rating from 6+ happy clients

What Our Clients Say

Real feedback from homeowners and businesses who trust Horizon Bath Remodel to get the job done right.

“Horizon restored our 1896 Beacon Hill bath to its original glory while discreetly adding heated floors. They sourced perfect replica tiles and matched the original plaster medallion around our new shower. The crew treated our historic home with such respect - covering hardwood floors daily and containing all dust.”

Eleanor R. Period-Correct Restoration
Mar 15, 2025

“After a hip replacement, I needed an accessible shower in our Cambridge Victorian. Horizon created a stunning curbless design with hidden grab bars and a teak seat that looks like luxury rather than medical equipment. Their waterproofing system gives me peace of mind in our old home.”

Marcus T. Walk-In Shower Conversion
Feb 28, 2025

“Our Newton Tudor now has a spa-like retreat with radiant heat, a steam shower, and custom cherry cabinetry. The team anticipated every detail - from outlets inside the medicine cabinet to perfect lighting for makeup application. Their project management kept everything on schedule despite supply chain delays.”

Sophia L. Luxury Primary Suite Bath
Jan 12, 2025

“Horizon transformed our dated Seaport condo bath into a sleek wet room with floor-to-ceiling marble. They solved persistent leaks from the unit above and soundproofed the walls better than the original builder. We especially appreciate their attention to winterizing details like the heated towel rack.”

David K. Complete Bathroom Renovation
Nov 5, 2024

“Planning for our future needs, Horizon designed a beautiful accessible bath in our Jamaica Plain home. The curbless shower has gorgeous mosaic tile that hides slip-resistant texture, and reinforced walls allow for easy grab bar additions later. It's functional now but ready for whatever comes next.”

Priya N. Universal Design Bathroom
Oct 18, 2024

“Our Back Bay townhouse's tiny powder room is now the talk of our book club! Horizon installed a floating vanity with concealed storage and dramatic black marble walls. They even found space for a discreet niche to hold spare TP. The quality exceeds what I've seen in much larger projects.”

James W. Powder Room Upgrade
Sep 30, 2024
Horizon Bath Remodel

Trusted bath remodel professionals serving Boston, MA and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
